labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541430 ($5,155,227,877) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541430 ($9,873,226,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.basis: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $191,989 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541430); class <5: 13,359 firms, avg revenue/firm $259,220 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $40,568 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 1,416 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,112,405 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $174,091 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 656 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,308,331 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $361,254 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 318 firms, avg revenue/firm $7,449,481 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,165,844 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 30 firms, avg revenue/firm $18,280,067 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $2,860,830 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 22 firms, avg revenue/firm $18,342,682 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $2,870,630 -> IN $1-10M band; n_band = 370
